prestazioni: Lamborghini L539 6.5L V12 naturally aspirated engine: Full carbon fiber intake manifold upgrade by Novitec Torado with integrated velocity stacks, increasing airflow efficiency by 12% and optimizing throttle response for the 740 PS (544 kW) output

Custom titanium exhaust system by Capristo featuring 4-inch diameter Inconel 625 headers, 200-cell catalytic converters, and electronically controlled butterfly valves for a 30% reduction in backpressure while maintaining OBD-II compliance

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), paired with Lamborghini-specific top mounts and spherical bearing lower control arms for precise alignment and 25mm adjustable ride height
estetica: Novitec Torado carbon fiber widebody kit with integrated front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser, extending the rear fenders by 60mm and the front by 45mm for aggressive stance and improved aerodynamics
Forge Motorsport carbon fiber engine cover with integrated heat extraction vents and a clear-coated weave finish, replacing the stock plastic cover for weight reduction and enhanced visual appeal

Custom 21-inch front and 22-inch rear forged aluminum wheels by Vossen HF-5 in a staggered fitment (265/30 ZR21 and 355/25 ZR22), wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires for maximum grip and track-focused performance
